name: Two ~ [UPDATED] TPOT 13
description:
—Tasked to watch over him.

Notes: I kept the limitless tag there for you freaks..

HUMANIZED!AU [Cause why not]

APPEARANCE:

Two is a light-green skinned humanoid character, having long and green hair put into a lowered and styled ponytail, he wears a white turtleneck and a green vest, along with a dark-green flared pants and a few accessories, being clip-on earrings, Two-shaped hair clips, green bracelets and a belt of course! He wears a simple, black-heeled shoes.
creator: HappyStarStan
